elements.name: Button
elements.description: A versatile button component with variant and size options. Supports a loading state that disables interaction and renders a spinner. Extends all standard HTML button attributes.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual style of the button.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Controls the height, padding, and text size of the button.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: When true, disables the button and renders an inline spinner.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: HTML button type attribute.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the button and prevents interaction.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes to apply to the button element.

attributes.name: children
attributes.description: Button label content (Svelte 5 snippet).

elements.name: ActionButton
elements.description: A button that wraps an async action function. Manages its own pending state during the async operation and surfaces errors via an optional `onerror` callback.

attributes.name: action
attributes.description: Required. The function (sync or async) to invoke on click.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual style of the button.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Controls the height, padding, and text size.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Additional external loading state layered on top of the internal pending state.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the button and prevents the action from firing.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: HTML button type attribute.

attributes.name: onerror
attributes.description: Called with the thrown value when the action rejects.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes to apply to the button element.

attributes.name: children
attributes.description: Button label content (Svelte 5 snippet).

elements.name: LinkButton
elements.description: An anchor element styled as a button. Use when the action navigates to a URL rather than triggering a side effect.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: Required. The URL the link navigates to.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual style of the button.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Controls the height, padding, and text size.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Applies disabled styling and prevents navigation.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes to apply to the anchor element.

attributes.name: children
attributes.description: Link label content (Svelte 5 snippet).

elements.name: IconButton
elements.description: A square button intended to hold a single icon. Requires an `aria-label` for accessibility.

attributes.name: aria-label
attributes.description: Required. Accessible label describing the button's action.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual style of the button.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Controls the button dimensions.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: HTML button type attribute.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the button.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes to apply to the button element.

attributes.name: children
attributes.description: Icon content (Svelte 5 snippet). Typically an SVG icon.

elements.name: Card
elements.description: A surface container with optional header and footer regions. All three regions are snippet-based so they can accept arbitrary Svelte content.

attributes.name: header
attributes.description: Rendered above the main content area (Svelte 5 snippet).

attributes.name: footer
attributes.description: Rendered below the main content area (Svelte 5 snippet).

attributes.name: children
attributes.description: Main card body content (Svelte 5 snippet).

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes to apply to the card root element.

elements.name: Badge
elements.description: A small inline label for status or category. Pairs well with text, table cells, and list items.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Color scheme of the badge.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Controls badge height and text size.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes.

attributes.name: children
attributes.description: Badge label content (Svelte 5 snippet).

elements.name: Tag
elements.description: A removable chip or label. When `dismissible` is true, renders a close button that calls `onDismiss`.

attributes.name: dismissible
attributes.description: When true, renders a close button alongside the tag content.

attributes.name: onDismiss
attributes.description: Called when the close button is clicked.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes.

attributes.name: children
attributes.description: Tag label content (Svelte 5 snippet).

elements.name: Alert
elements.description: An inline notification banner. Use `severity` to communicate the nature of the message. When `dismissible` is true, a close button is rendered.

attributes.name: severity
attributes.description: Determines icon and color scheme.

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Optional bold heading rendered above the body content.

attributes.name: dismissible
attributes.description: When true, renders a close button.

attributes.name: onDismiss
attributes.description: Called when the close button is clicked.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the alert root element.

attributes.name: children
attributes.description: Alert body content (Svelte 5 snippet).

elements.name: Spinner
elements.description: An animated loading indicator. Renders an `aria-live` region with a visually hidden label for screen readers.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Controls the diameter of the spinner.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Visually hidden text announced to screen readers.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes.

elements.name: Skeleton
elements.description: A placeholder shape that mimics the layout of content while it loads.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: CSS width value for the skeleton block.

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: CSS height value for the skeleton block.

attributes.name: rounded
attributes.description: Border radius. Pass `true` for the default rounding or a named token.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes.

elements.name: Divider
elements.description: A visual separator line built on Bits UI's Separator primitive. Defaults to decorative (no semantic role).

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: Draws the line horizontally or vertically.

attributes.name: decorative
attributes.description: When true the element is hidden from the accessibility tree. Set to false to expose it as a separator landmark.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes.

elements.name: ProgressBar
elements.description: A progress indicator built on Bits UI's Progress primitive. Pass `null` for `value` to render an indeterminate state.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Current progress value. Pass `null` for an indeterminate state.

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: Maximum value of the progress range.

attributes.name: min
attributes.description: Minimum value of the progress range.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible label for screen readers.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the track element.

elements.name: Avatar
elements.description: A user avatar built on Bits UI's Avatar primitive. Renders an image when `src` is provided and falls back to text initials or a default icon.

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: URL of the avatar image.

attributes.name: alt
attributes.description: Alt text for the avatar image.

attributes.name: fallback
attributes.description: Text (typically 1–2 initials) shown when the image fails to load.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Controls the avatar diameter.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes.

elements.name: Label
elements.description: A form label built on Bits UI's Label primitive. Associates with an input via the `for` attribute and applies disabled/required styling.

attributes.name: for
attributes.description: ID of the form control this label describes.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Appends a required indicator to the label text.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Applies muted styling to indicate the associated control is disabled.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes.

attributes.name: children
attributes.description: Label text content (Svelte 5 snippet).

elements.name: Checkbox
elements.description: A checkbox built on Bits UI's Checkbox primitive. Supports two-way binding on `checked` and an indeterminate state.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Bindable. Whether the checkbox is checked.

attributes.name: indeterminate
attributes.description: Bindable. Renders a mixed/indeterminate state.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Prevents interaction.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Marks the field as required for form validation.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Name attribute for form submission.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Value submitted with the form when checked.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Inline label text rendered next to the checkbox.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: ID applied to the input for external label association.

attributes.name: onCheckedChange
attributes.description: Called with the new checked state whenever it changes.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes.

elements.name: RadioGroup
elements.description: A group of radio buttons built on Bits UI's RadioGroup primitive. Renders from a flat `items` array.

attributes.name: items
attributes.description: Required. Array of radio options to render.

value.type: Array<{ value: string; label: string; disabled?: boolean }>

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Bindable. The value of the currently selected radio.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Name attribute for form submission.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables all options in the group.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Marks the field as required for form validation.

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: Layout direction of the radio options.

attributes.name: onValueChange
attributes.description: Called with the newly selected value.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes.

elements.name: Switch
elements.description: A toggle switch built on Bits UI's Switch primitive. Supports two-way binding on `checked`.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Bindable. Whether the switch is on.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Prevents interaction.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Marks the field as required for form validation.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Name attribute for form submission.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Value submitted with the form when on.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Inline label text rendered next to the switch.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: ID applied to the input for external label association.

attributes.name: onCheckedChange
attributes.description: Called with the new checked state whenever it changes.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes.

elements.name: Select
elements.description: A custom select dropdown built on Bits UI's Select primitive. Renders from a flat `items` array and supports two-way binding on `value`.

attributes.name: items
attributes.description: Required. Array of options to display in the dropdown.

value.type: Array<{ value: string; label: string; disabled?: boolean }>

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Bindable. The currently selected option value.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Text shown in the trigger when no value is selected.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the select control.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Marks the field as required for form validation.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Name attribute for form submission.

attributes.name: onValueChange
attributes.description: Called with the newly selected value.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the trigger element.

elements.name: Dialog
elements.description: A modal dialog built on Bits UI's Dialog primitive. Supports two-way binding on `open`. Pass a `trigger` snippet to render an inline trigger element, or control `open` externally.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Bindable. Whether the dialog is open.

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Heading text rendered at the top of the dialog content.

attributes.name: description
attributes.description: Subheading text rendered below the title.

attributes.name: trigger
attributes.description: Snippet rendered as the dialog trigger element (Svelte 5 snippet).

attributes.name: footer
attributes.description: Snippet rendered in the footer area — typically action buttons (Svelte 5 snippet).

attributes.name: children
attributes.description: Main dialog body content (Svelte 5 snippet).

attributes.name: onOpenChange
attributes.description: Called with the new open state when the dialog opens or closes.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the dialog content panel.

elements.name: Popover
elements.description: A non-modal floating panel built on Bits UI's Popover primitive. Renders adjacent to its trigger with configurable side placement.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Bindable. Whether the popover is visible.

attributes.name: side
attributes.description: Which side of the trigger the popover appears on.

attributes.name: sideOffset
attributes.description: Distance in pixels between the popover and the trigger.

attributes.name: trigger
attributes.description: Snippet rendered as the popover trigger element (Svelte 5 snippet).

attributes.name: children
attributes.description: Popover panel content (Svelte 5 snippet).

attributes.name: onOpenChange
attributes.description: Called with the new open state.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the popover content panel.

elements.name: Tooltip
elements.description: A floating tooltip built on Bits UI's Tooltip primitive. Wraps any element passed as `children` and shows `content` on hover/focus after a configurable delay.

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: Required. The text displayed inside the tooltip.

attributes.name: side
attributes.description: Which side of the trigger the tooltip appears on.

attributes.name: sideOffset
attributes.description: Distance in pixels between the tooltip and the trigger.

attributes.name: delay
attributes.description: Milliseconds before the tooltip appears after hover/focus.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: When true, the tooltip never opens.

attributes.name: children
attributes.description: The trigger element that the tooltip is anchored to (Svelte 5 snippet).

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the tooltip content element.

elements.name: Accordion
elements.description: A vertically stacked set of disclosure panels built on Bits UI's Accordion primitive. Supports single-open and multi-open modes.

attributes.name: items
attributes.description: Required. Array of accordion panels to render.

value.type: Array<{ value: string; title: string; content: string; disabled?: boolean }>

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Whether only one panel can be open at a time (`single`) or multiple (`multiple`).

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Bindable. The currently open panel value(s). A string when `type` is `single`, a string array when `type` is `multiple`.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables all panels in the accordion.

attributes.name: onValueChange
attributes.description: Called with the new open value(s) when a panel is toggled.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the accordion root.

elements.name: Tabs
elements.description: A tabbed interface built on Bits UI's Tabs primitive. Renders tab triggers and their associated content panels from a flat `items` array.

attributes.name: items
attributes.description: Required. Array of tab definitions.

value.type: Array<{ value: string; label: string; content: string; disabled?: boolean }>

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Bindable. The value of the currently active tab. Defaults to the first item's value.

attributes.name: onValueChange
attributes.description: Called with the newly activated tab value.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the tabs root element.

elements.name: Pagination
elements.description: A pagination control built on Bits UI's Pagination primitive. Renders numbered page buttons, previous/next controls, and ellipsis indicators.

attributes.name: count
attributes.description: Required. Total number of items across all pages.

attributes.name: perPage
attributes.description: Number of items per page, used to calculate the total page count.

attributes.name: siblingCount
attributes.description: Number of page buttons shown on each side of the current page.

attributes.name: page
attributes.description: Bindable. The currently active page number (1-indexed).

attributes.name: onPageChange
attributes.description: Called with the new page number when the user navigates.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the pagination root.

elements.name: Menu
elements.description: A dropdown context menu built on Bits UI's DropdownMenu primitive. Renders a list of action items from the `items` array, including optional separators.

attributes.name: items
attributes.description: Required. Array of menu items and separators. A separator entry is `{ separator: true }`. An action entry is `{ label: string; action?: () => void | Promise<void>; disabled?: boolean }`.

value.type: Array<{ separator: true } | { separator?: false; label: string; action?: () => void | Promise<void>; disabled?: boolean }>

attributes.name: trigger
attributes.description: Snippet rendered as the menu trigger element (Svelte 5 snippet).

attributes.name: side
attributes.description: Which side of the trigger the menu opens on.

attributes.name: sideOffset
attributes.description: Distance in pixels between the menu and the trigger.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Bindable. Whether the menu is open.

attributes.name: onOpenChange
attributes.description: Called with the new open state.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the menu content panel.

elements.name: Input
elements.description: A styled text input that extends all standard HTML input attributes. Displays an inline error message below when `error` is set.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Bindable. The current input value.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Error message displayed below the input. Applies error ring styling when set.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the input.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the input element.

elements.name: Textarea
elements.description: A styled textarea that extends all standard HTML textarea attributes. Supports configurable resize behavior and inline error display.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Bindable. The current textarea value.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Error message displayed below the textarea. Applies error ring styling when set.

attributes.name: resize
attributes.description: Controls which directions the user can resize the textarea.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the textarea.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the textarea element.

elements.name: Field
elements.description: A form field wrapper that composes a Label, optional hint text, an error message, and a form control slot. Handles `id` linkage and required/disabled state.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Required. Text for the field label.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Required. ID linking the label to its form control.

attributes.name: hint
attributes.description: Helper text rendered below the label and above any error.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Error message rendered below the control. Also puts the field into an error state.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Passes required styling through to the label.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Passes disabled styling through to the label.

attributes.name: children
attributes.description: The form control (e.g. Input, Select) rendered inside the field (Svelte 5 snippet).

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the field root element.

elements.name: Table
elements.description: A responsive data table. Renders columns defined by a `TableColumn` array against an array of row objects. Supports striped rows and a screen-reader caption.

attributes.name: columns
attributes.description: Required. Column definitions. `key` must match a property on the row type.

value.type: Array<{ key: string; label: string; align?: 'left' | 'center' | 'right' }>

attributes.name: rows
attributes.description: Required. Array of data objects to render as table rows.

attributes.name: caption
attributes.description: Screen-reader-only caption text for the table.

attributes.name: striped
attributes.description: When true, alternating rows receive a subtle background tint.

attributes.name: class
attributes.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the table wrapper element.
